---
title: "Left-Aligned Dashboard"
format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 300px
      body-width: 1200px
      margin-width: 300px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
filters:
  - pyodide
execute:
  enabled: false
  echo: false
  code-fold: true
  code-summary: "Show code"
---

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Parameters

```{pyodide-python}
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: false
#| code-summary: "Simulation Parameters"

param_a = 10
param_b = 20
```

### Output

```{pyodide-python}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Example output"
print(f"Parameters are a={param_a}, b={param_b}")
```

:::
